label.description: Accessible label for the waveform. Required for screen readers.

description.description: Optional description rendered below the label.

data.description: Time-domain amplitude samples. Each value should be in the range [-1, 1]; values outside this range are clamped.

renderMode.description: How to render the waveform: as a continuous path or vertical amplitude bars. Default `path`.

height.description: Pixel height of the chart. Default `80`.

loading.description: Whether the waveform is in a loading state. Default `false`.

dataTableCaption.description: Custom data table caption; falls back to `label`.

class.description: Custom class applied to the root element.

unsupportedProps.name: empty
unsupportedProps.description: Snippet rendered when the chart has no data.
